blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 22 inches of snowfall of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,249 ft. Looking ahead, 34 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 26.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 10" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
